title: Domicile of the board
doc_html:
§833.  Domicile of the board

The domicile of the board shall be the parish of Orleans, state of Louisiana where and only where it may be sued.  The board may, however, establish its office in the metropolitan New Orleans area.  

Acts 1983, No. 454, §1.
